name: Truman Director
description: LLM-directed tick-based town simulator. The world tool exposes init | tick | inject_event; agent decisions are produced by the host LLM via sampling.
_comment: The publish metadata (slug/name/version/executa_type) is read by `anna-app apps publish`; the dev fields (tool_id/type/enabled) are read by `anna-app dev`. Run `python scripts/set-tool-id.py apply --tool <minted>` to rewrite the minted tool_id across pyproject.toml, executa.json and bundle/app.js once you mint one at https://anna.partners/executa. The plugin itself carries no tool_id — it is the callee, spawned by the console-script name. This dir is the `truman-director` handle referenced by app.json#bundled_executas.
